Use explicit extensions instead of video/* to avoid Android gallery picker

Lists common video and audio extensions so Android opens the file

feat: wallet actions, BSC trade execution, and trading profile (#838)

* feat: wallet actions, BSC trade execution, and trading profile

- Add EXECUTE_TRADE action for BSC token swaps via PancakeSwap
- Add TRANSFER_TOKEN action for BNB/token transfers
- Enhance CHECK_BALANCE action with BSC chain support
- Add GET_SELF_STATUS action for runtime self-introspection
- Add src/api/bsc-trade.ts: quote generation, preflight checks, RPC fallback
- Add src/api/wallet-trading-profile.ts: trade ledger, P&L analytics
- Add src/services/privy-wallets.ts: automated EVM + Solana wallet provisioning
- Update src/api/server.ts: trade permission modes, new route registration
- Update src/api/agent-model.ts: add resolveProviderFromModel helper
- Remove wallet-action-shared.ts: simplify API call flow (no MILADY_API_TOKEN auth)

Co-Authored-By: Milady-BSC <miladybsc@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(plugin-bnb-identity): fix package exports to resolve in Vitest and tsc

Update exports to serve ./src/index.ts for all conditions (types, bun,
import, default). Previously the import condition pointed to ./dist/index.js
which doesn't exist in CI (package is not pre-built), causing:

- tsc: TS7016 Could not find a declaration file for @milady/plugin-bnb-identity
- vitest: Failed to resolve entry for package @milady/plugin-bnb-identity

The dist/ output is only needed for npm publishing; internal monorepo usage
should resolve directly to the TypeScript source.

Co-Authored-By: Milady-BSC <miladybsc@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: resolve all CI failures on feat/wallet-actions-bsc-trade

- Restore src/api/server.ts via 3-way merge (develop + bsc-adoption):
  preserves /api/health endpoint, handleNfaRoutes, connector health
  monitor, wireCoordinatorBridgesWhenReady, shouldServeSpaFallback while
  adding trade/wallet routes, privy routes, automation mode API,
  deletedConversationIds state, TradePermissionMode helpers, avatar
  background endpoint, and agent self-status route from bsc-adoption
- Fix TS2322/TS2352 in packages/plugin-bnb-identity: cast handler props
  as `unknown as Handler` and examples as `unknown as ActionExample[][]`
- Update chat SSE done-event assertions to use objectContaining so the
  new `usage` token-count field does not break the tests

Co-Authored-By: Milady-BSC <miladybsc@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: restore all security guards removed in bsc-adoption cherry-pick

Addresses all 10 issues raised by automated reviewer on PR #838:

- Restore wallet-action-shared.ts (WALLET_ACTION_API_PORT, buildAuthHeaders)
- execute-trade: remove extractParamsFromText prompt-injection vector;
  restore logger.debug, validate wallet precondition, auth headers;
  use shared API port constant
- transfer-token + check-balance: use shared WALLET_ACTION_API_PORT,
  add buildAuthHeaders() to fetch calls
- bsc-trade: restore assertRouterAddress() guard (called in buy+sell),
  minimum receive floor (minReceiveWei=1n guard), HTTP RPC warning,
  BigInt error handling in buildBscApproveUnsignedTx, export readTokenDecimals
- privy-wallets: restore HTTPS enforcement in resolvePrivyConfig
- server.ts: fix hardcoded-18-decimals bug in transfer route (fetch
  actual decimals via readTokenDecimals), fix findOwnPackageRoot typo
  (milaidy), remove dead _parseTradePermissionMode/_persistTradePermissionMode/
  _rejectAgentMutation functions
- execute-trade.test.ts: restore validate precondition tests, auth
  header tests, and prompt-injection resistance tests (8 new tests)

Co-Authored-By: Milady-BSC <miladybsc@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address all automated reviewer findings on PR #838

- plugin-bnb-identity/src/actions.ts + nfa-actions.ts: fix Handler type
  casts — properly type all handlers to match Handler signature (optional
  callback, correct options type, Promise<ActionResult | undefined>)
- plugin-bnb-identity/package.json: add prepare script to build dist on
  install; restore import/default exports to ./dist/index.js
- plugin-bnb-identity/src/__tests__/action-handlers.test.ts: fix
  HandlerCallback return type (must return Memory[])
- src/actions/transfer-token.ts: restore EVM_ADDRESS_RE validation for
  optional tokenAddress; restore assetSymbol format check; restore validate
  precondition (requires EVM_PRIVATE_KEY or PRIVY_APP_ID)
- src/actions/transfer-token.test.ts: add tests for new validations and
  validate=false when no wallet configured
- src/api/server.ts: derive isAgentRequest from X-Milady-Agent-Action
  header (isAgentAutomationRequest) instead of body.source field; rename
  SSE done event usage field to estimatedUsage
- src/api/server.trade-permissions.test.ts: add unit tests for
  resolveTradePermissionMode and canUseLocalTradeExecution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(plugin-bnb-identity): exclude __tests__ from tsconfig.build.json

The prepare/build script runs tsc declaration emit which includes
src/__tests__/ (bun test files that use bun:test). Exclude __tests__
from the build tsconfig so bun install can build the dist cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: auto-fix misspelled usernames in transcripts after upload

Post-processes transcript entries using commenter display names from the
video's chat as a dictionary. Uses Levenshtein distance (max 2 edits,
≥65% similarity) to fuzzy-match and correct misspelled names. Only
considers active chatters (≥3 messages) to reduce false positives.

Runs automatically after transcript upload, returns names_corrected count.

commit.message:
fix: webhook Pro/Enterprise crée des clés avec le bon plan

Les clés créées via checkout.session.completed avaient plan='mcp_pro_test'
ou 'mcp_pro_live' au lieu de 'pro'/'enterprise'. Ces valeurs inconnues
de _MONTHLY_LIMITS supprimaient le quota mensuel — un client Pro pouvait
utiliser le service sans limite.

Corrigé : plan='pro' et plan='enterprise' dans les deux branches.
Le préfixe de la clé (mcp_test_ vs mcp_pro_) reste déterminé par test_mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: /research section — hub, paper, and methodology pages

Web-native research publication with three pages:
- Hub (/research): hero, 4 anchor finding cards, pipeline funnel SVG,
  audience pathway cards, sortable data sources table, citation block
- Paper (/research/paper): full research paper with sidebar TOC scroll spy,
  7 interactive sortable tables, reading progress bar, mobile TOC
- Methodology (/research/methodology): 16 sections with CLM-XXXX evidence
  refs (hover tooltips), FAIL-XXXX failure registry cards, validation
  progress bars, pipeline SVG diagram

Includes source content (research paper, methodology, policy brief) and
structured findings data (F01-F10 evidence JSON, findings package).

Fix dark mode consistency across all mobile app screens

Complete dark mode implementation with no hardcoded colors:

Settings Screen:
- All stats cards use dynamic colors
- Account info section fully themed
- Password change inputs themed
- Server section themed
- Client tokens themed
- UnifiedPush section themed with error colors
- User management with dynamic Switch colors
- Logout button with themed border
- Radio buttons with dynamic border colors

Login Screen:
- Logo and text colors adapt to theme
- All inputs themed (background, border, text, placeholder)
- Sign In button uses primary color
- Server settings toggle themed

All Screens (Apps, Topics, Webhooks):
- Updated by subagent with full theme support
- Modals consistently themed
- All text, icons, backgrounds adapt

Result: 100% consistent dark mode throughout entire app

YPE-1156: Hooks - Deprecate Unused Hooks (#187)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* deprecate(hooks): mark useInitData as deprecated and remove tests

- Add @deprecated JSDoc directing users to useVersion, useBook, useChapter
- Remove useInitData.test.tsx (no tests for deprecated code)
- Exclude useInitData.ts from coverage reporting

Amp-Thread-ID: https://ampcode.com/threads/T-019cba0e-451d-74d4-9208-f6958c558b50
Co-authored-by: Amp <amp@ampcode.com>

* deprecate(hooks): mark unused hooks, providers, and contexts for removal

Deprecate dead code not used by the UI package or any known consumers:
- useChapterNavigation (UI uses getAdjacentChapter from core directly)
- ReaderProvider, ReaderContext, useReaderContext (UI has its own BibleReaderContext)
- VerseSelectionProvider, VerseSelectionContext, useVerseSelection (UI handles selection via props)

Remove tests for deprecated code and exclude from coverage.

Amp-Thread-ID: https://ampcode.com/threads/T-019cba0e-451d-74d4-9208-f6958c558b50
Co-authored-by: Amp <amp@ampcode.com>

* Added changeset

* Remove Reader and Verse Selection contexts

The ReaderContext, ReaderProvider, VerseSelectionContext, and
VerseSelectionProvider, along with their associated hooks, are
deprecated and no longer necessary. These components have been removed
to simplify the hooks package.

* docs(hooks): fix duplicate JSDoc and add missing deprecation tag

- Merge duplicate JSDoc blocks on useChapterNavigation into one
- Add @deprecated to VerseSelectionContextData type for consistency

Amp-Thread-ID: https://ampcode.com/threads/T-019cba40-e17d-779a-aef7-d1a5ea3fd36b
Co-authored-by: Amp <amp@ampcode.com>

* feat: Include .changeset directory in unified versioning rule

This ensures that any changes within the .changeset directory are also
subject to the unified versioning rule, maintaining consistency across
all packages.

* Deprecate VerseSelectionContextData

commit.message:
fix(radiodj): corriger encodage UTF-8/Latin-1 des pistes RadioDJ

RadioDJ (Windows) envoie les données form-urlencoded en UTF-8, mais
Starlette décode par défaut en Latin-1, causant du mojibake
(ex: "célèbre" → "cÃ©lÃ¨bre"). Remplace request.form() par un
parsing manuel avec parse_qs qui tente UTF-8 puis Latin-1 en fallback.

Fix duplicate QR scan firing with two-layer dedup

Camera-level ref (lastSeenRef) suppresses repeated calls while the same
QR stays in frame. App-level Set (scannedCodesRef) hard-blocks any code
already scanned this session. Both reset on handleCancel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: emoji GC/DC markers clipped at right/bottom edges

Use 160x160 PIL canvas with (25,25) draw offset and getbbox() crop
to capture full NotoColorEmoji glyph before resizing to 48px.
Also add set_clip_on(False) to AnnotationBbox to prevent axes clipping.

Support interactive shell mode in cloister-sandbox

allowing rapid-press escalation (SIGTERM → SIGKILL).

commit.message:
fix: execSync→execFileSync in register + refactored fallback loop + tests (#47)

* Fix `execSync` command injection vulnerabilities in `src/commands/register.ts`

- Refactored `getCurrentBranch` and `getChangedFiles` to use `execFileSync` instead of `execSync`.
- Replaced the vulnerable shell OR `||` fallbacks with secure `try/catch` fallback blocks logic.

Co-authored-by: google-labs-jules[bot] <161369871+google-labs-jules[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* msan: add Nav Beacon for SUPABASE_PROJECTS.md

* fix: refactor getChangedFiles to loop + remove duplicate validateAgentId + add tests

Refactored 3-nested try/catch in getChangedFiles() into a clean for-of
loop over diff strategies. Removed duplicate validateAgentId() call
(lines 143-153 were redundant — already validated at 134-141).
Added 10 security tests verifying execFileSync usage, argv safety,
and file path validation.
